zh.lifeSummary: 當Owain ap Bleddyn於大約1140年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維時，他的父親Bleddyn ap Tudur47歲，母親Ann ferch Llywelyn36歲。他與Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton在英國威爾斯可爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owain ap Bleddyn于大约1140年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維时，他的父亲Bleddyn ap Tudur47岁，母亲Ann ferch Llywelyn36岁。他与Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton在英国威尔斯可爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Owain ap Bleddyn was born about 1140, in Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Bleddyn ap Tudur, was 47 and his mother, Ann ferch Llywelyn, was 36. He married Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owain ap Bleddyn est né environ 1140, à Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bleddyn ap Tudur, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Ann ferch Llywelyn, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton à Clwyd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Owain ap Bleddyn um 1140 in Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bleddyn ap Tudur 47 und seine Mutter Ann ferch Llywelyn 36. Er hat in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owain ap Bleddyn è nato il circa 1140 nel Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Bleddyn ap Tudur, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Ann ferch Llywelyn, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton nel Clwyd, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Owain ap Bleddynが約1140年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアランゴレンペングウエルンで生まれた時，父Bleddyn ap Tudurは47歳，母Ann ferch Llywelynは36歳であった。イギリスウェールズクルウイドでEfa verch Madog Goch of Suttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Owain ap Bleddyn(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭렌 펜그워에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bleddyn ap Tudur(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann ferch Llywelyn(은)는 36세였다. 그는 영국 웨일스 클w이드에서 Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Owain ap Bleddyn nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Bleddyn ap Tudur, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Ann ferch Llywelyn, tinha 36 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owain ap Bleddyn родился около 1140 г. в местности пэнгвирн, лланголлен, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Bleddyn ap Tudur было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann ferch Llywelyn, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton в местности клвид, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе.
